## Type of Change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] `feat` — new feature or capability
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — code restructuring, no behavior change
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — build, tooling, dependencies
- [ ] `test` — tests added or updated
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `style` — formatting / whitespace only
- [ ] **Breaking change** — existing behavior changes (fill in Breaking Changes below)

## Checklist

<!-- All boxes must be checked before requesting review. -->

- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format (`type(scope): subject`)
- [ ] Each commit is a cohesive logical unit (no "fix stuff" or mixed-concern commits)
- [ ] Build passes (`.\gradlew.bat build`)
- [ ] Markdown lint passes (`.\__md_lint.ps1` — 0 issues)
- [ ] Cross-references verified (internal links, resource counts, navigation)
- [ ] No regression in existing behaviour
- [ ] Breaking changes documented above (if any)
- [ ] Related issues linked above (if any)
